Name: EXAMPLE_EXPORT_TABLETOEXCEL
Description:
EXAMPLE_EXPORT_TABLETOEXCEL

This template provides an illustration of utilizing SQL_CLR to export data to excel and upload, although it should be noted that this process is not fully functional.

In the stored procedure Prescript_Example_ExportExcelFile, clr_TableExport is employed to export data by utilizing a SQL view and passing parameters. It's important to note that the path specified should be a local path on the SQL server, which can likely be configured within the StaticData table.
Author: Josh
